memoryArtifacts.headline: Life Sketch of Thys Barentsen
memoryArtifacts.description:
Thys Barentsen was born in 1621 in Leerdam, Holland.  He was the son of Barent and Sibilla Van Horan.  His father was 26 and his mother 22 when he was born.

     Thys married Scytie Cornelius, p …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Matthys Barentsen Swaim於1621年出生在荷蘭-拉藍德利爾達姆時，他的父親Barend Mathijs27歲，母親Pietertje Willems24歲。他於1643年之前與Peterke Jans結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和6個女兒的父母。他於1661年移民到尼福 內德藍德劍橋大學默里 阿姆斯特爾達姆。他於1673年在尼福 內德藍德被列為magistrate for staten island。他去世於1682年11月在美國紐約州里士滿里士滿享年61歲，埋葬在美國紐約州里士滿里士滿。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Matthys Barentsen Swaim于1621年出生在荷兰-拉藍德利爾達姆时，他的父亲Barend Mathijs27岁，母亲Pietertje Willems24岁。他于1643年之前与Peterke Jans结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和6个女儿的父母。他于1661年移民到尼福 內德藍德劍橋大學默里 阿姆斯特爾達姆。他于1673年在尼福 內德藍德被列为magistrate for staten island。他去世于1682年11月在美国纽约州里士滿里士滿享年61岁，埋葬在美国纽约州里士滿里士滿。

nameMeanings.name: Swaim
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Americanized form of Dutch   Sweem  . Compare   Swim   and   Swims  .

History: The surname Swaim was adopted in the late 17th century by the Dutch Barentse (or, according to other sources, Van Pelt) family in Staten Island, NY. The family legend says that it is an acronym for Sworn to Withhold Allegiance from Invading Monarchy, the slogan of a Dutch resistance group in New Netherlands.

variants.name: Sweem
meanings: Dutch: nickname from Middle Dutch sweem, the name of a waterbird, or a topographic name from Middle Dutch sweme ‘wet land, pond’. Alternatively, perhaps Dutch form of the related German surname Schwemm (see Schwemmer ). The surname Sweem is not found in the Netherlands. Compare Swaim , Swim , and Swims .

variants.name: Swims
meanings: Altered form of Swaim or Swim , surnames of Dutch and English (ultimately perhaps German) origin, with the addition of excrescent -s.

variants.name: Swim
meanings: Altered form of   Swaim  , a surname of Dutch origin.
English: Anglicized form of an unidentified, perhaps German surname.

nameMeanings.name: Matthys
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Swiss German: variant of   Mathis   1, a cognate of 2 below.

Dutch: variant, mostly Flemish, archaic or Americanized, of Matthijs, from a variant of the personal name Matthias (see Matthew ). The surname of Flemish origin is also found in the Walloon part of Belgium and in France (mainly Nord).
English: variant of   Mathis   2. This form of the name is rare in Britain and Ireland.

variants.name: Mathis
meanings: and Norwegian: learned doublet of   Mads .

historicEvents.description: Curacao became a colony of the Netherlands.
End of Eighty Years' War with Spain.

en.lifeSummary: When Matthys Barentsen Swaim was born in 1621, in Leerdam, South Holland, Netherlands, his father, Barend Mathijs, was 27 and his mother, Pietertje Willems, was 24. He married Peterke Jans before 1643. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 6 daughters. He immigrated to New Amsterdam, New Netherland in 1661. In 1673, at the age of 52, his occupation is listed as magistrate for staten island in New Netherland. He died in November 1682, in Richmond, Richmond, New York, United States, at the age of 61, and was buried in Richmond, Richmond, New York, United States.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Matthys Barentsen Swaim est né en 1621, à Leerdam, Hollande-Méridionale, Pays-Bas, son père, Barend Mathijs, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Pietertje Willems, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Peterke Jans avant 1643. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 6 filles. Il a immigré au New Amsterdam, Nieuw Nederland en 1661. En 1673, à l’âge de 52 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est magistrate for staten island à Nieuw Nederland. Il est décédé en novembre 1682, à Richmond, Richmond, New York, États-Unis, à l’âge de 61 ans, et a été enterré à Richmond, Richmond, New York, États-Unis.

de.lifeSummary: Als Matthys Barentsen Swaim 1621 in Leerdam, Südholland, Niederlande geboren wurde, war sein Vater Barend Mathijs 27 und seine Mutter Pietertje Willems 24. Er hat vor 1643 Peterke Jans geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Er ist 1661 nach New Amsterdam, Nieuw Nederland eingewandert. 1673, als er 52 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als magistrate for staten island in Nieuw Nederland aufgeführt. Er starb im November 1682 im Alter von 61 Jahren in Richmond, Richmond, New York, Vereinigte Staaten und wurde in Richmond, Richmond, New York, Vereinigte Staaten begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Matthys Barentsen Swaim è nato il nel 1621 nel Leerdam, Zuid-Holland, Paesi Bassi, il suo padre, Barend Mathijs, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Pietertje Willems, aveva 24 anni. Lui sposato Peterke Jans prima del 1643. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 6 figlie. Immigrato nel New Amsterdam, Nieuw Nederland nel 1661. Nel 1673, all'età di 52 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come magistrate for staten island nel Nieuw Nederland. Morì nel novembre 1682, nel Richmond, Richmond, New York, Stati Uniti d'America, all'età di 61 anni, e fu sepolto a Richmond, Richmond, New York, Stati Uniti d'America.

ja.lifeSummary: Matthys Barentsen Swaimが1621年にオランダズイド-hオランドリールダムで生まれた時，父Barend Mathijsは27歳，母Pietertje Willemsは24歳であった。1643年以前にPeterke Jansと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼は1661年にニーウウ ネダーランドニュー アムステルダムに移住した。1673年，52歳の時，ニーウウ ネダーランドでの職業はmagistrate for staten islandと記録されている。彼は1682年11月にアメリカ合衆国ニューヨーク州リチモンドリチモンドで61歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国ニューヨーク州リチモンドリチモンドにて埋葬された。

ko.Richmond, New York Colony, British Colon: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 뉴 요르크 콜론이 리ch몽
ko.lifeSummary: Matthys Barentsen Swaim(이)가 1621년 네덜란드 주이드-홀랜드 리르다에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Barend Mathijs(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Pietertje Willems(은)는 24세였다. 그는 1643년 이전 Peterke Jans(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1661년에 니우w 네델랜드 뉴 아스터다로 이민을 떠났다. 1673년, 52세의 나이로 그의 직업은 니우w 네델랜드에서 magistrate for staten island이었다. 그는 1682년 11월 미국 뉴욕 주 리ch몽 리ch몽에서 61세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 뉴욕 주 리ch몽 리ch몽에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Matthys Barentsen Swaim nasceu em 1621, em Leerdam, Zuid-Holland, Países Baixos, seu pai, Barend Mathijs, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Pietertje Willems, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Peterke Jans antes 1643. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 6 filhas. Ele imigrou para o New Amsterdam, Nieuw Nederland em 1661. Em 1673, com 52 anos, sua profissão aparece como magistrate for staten island em Nieuw Nederland. Ele faleceu em novembro de 1682, em Richmond, Richmond, Nova Iorque, Estados Unidos da América, com 61 anos, e foi sepultado em Richmond, Richmond, Nova Iorque, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Matthys Barentsen Swaim родился в 1621 г. в местности лирдам, зуид-холланд, Нидерланды, его отцу по имени Barend Mathijs было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Pietertje Willems, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Peterke Jans перед 1643 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 6 дочерей. Он иммигрировал в ню амстирдам, ниеув недирланд в 1661 году. В 1673 году, в возрасте 52 лет,  он работал по профессии magistrate for staten island в местности ниеув недирланд. Он умер ноябрь 1682 г. в местности ричмонд, ричмонд, Нью-Йорк, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 61 год и был похоронен в местности ричмонд, ричмонд, Нью-Йорк, Соединенные штаты.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Matthys Barentsen Swaim nació en 1621, en Leerdam, Zuid-Holland, Países Bajos, su papá, Barend Mathijs, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Pietertje Willems, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Peterke Jans antes de 1643. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 6 hijas. Inmigró a New Amsterdam, Nieuw Nederland en 1661. En 1673, a la edad de 52 años, su ocupación registrada era magistrate for staten island en Nieuw Nederland. Murió en noviembre de 1682, en Richmond, Richmond, Nueva York, Estados Unidos, a la edad de 61 años, y fue sepultado en Richmond, Richmond, Nueva York, Estados Unidos.
